summary: Critical failures: (1) `actions/checkout@v4` unpinned to SHA—violates security requirement; (2) Entire test harness missing—workflow doesn't run multiple test cases, capture to act-result.txt, validate outputs, or execute through act as mandated; (3) No fixture infrastructure (fixtures/ directory, fixture setup in workflow); (4) No actionlint validation. Workflow is single-run only. Scripts themselves well-written (good types, error handling), but workflow completely fails delivery requirements: no test case iteration, no output capture, no `act-result.txt` (required artifact), hardcoded date/fixture. Missing: fixture data setup, act invocation harness, per-case output validation, YAML structure tests, actionlint checks. Non-functional for stated purpose.
